title: PAR(2) Discovery Engine - Complete Analysis Results

summary.strongest_finding: Clock > target hierarchy: 12/12 tissues, all p < 0.05

test_e_bridge.oscillatory_loss: Complex eigenvalues drop 22.7% to 5.8% in APC-KO

honest_assessment.novel: |lambda| as continuous persistence metric; root-space genome map; resolution invariance
honest_assessment.not_novel: Clock > target hierarchy (known qualitatively); circadian-cancer link (epidemiology)
honest_assessment.strongest_claim: Robust two-parameter method quantifying temporal persistence across tissues, species, and conditions with formal permutation validation
honest_assessment.unverified: |lambda| superiority over existing metrics; cancer progression prediction; translational amplification

phase_portrait_coupling.description: BMAL1 coupling analysis across 12 GSE54650 tissues using Phase Portrait Explorer
key_findings: Wee1 universally clock-coupled in 10/12 tissues (confirmed by Matsuo et al. 2003)
Nampt broadly clock-coupled in 8/12 tissues (confirmed by Ramsey et al. 2009)
Lung has most coupled genes (14), Hypothalamus fewest (2)
Ogg1 DNA repair couples in heart/muscle but not liver (tissue-specific)
Actb/Tubb5 reference gene instability confirmed with tissue-specific map
10 novel testable predictions generated for experimental validation

before_after_trajectories.description: Pre-loaded before/after comparison pairs showing eigenvalue trajectory shifts under biological perturbations

pairs.name: Immune Activation
pairs.description: Dendritic cell Mock vs LPS stimulation (Rabani 2014)

pairs.name: Shift Work
pairs.description: Day shift vs night shift nurses (GSE122541)

circadian_health_score.description: 0-100 scoring system summarizing circadian regulatory health of a dataset

hierarchy_rate.description: Percentage of genes following clock > target hierarchy

coverage.description: Fraction of known circadian genes detected in dataset

volatile_genes.description: Cross-dataset eigenvalue variance ranking identifying genes with most variable persistence
volatile_genes.methodology: Compute eigenvalue for each gene across all datasets where it appears, calculate standard deviation, scale by sqrt of number of datasets to reward breadth of evidence

literature_validation_falsification.description: 59-gene curated database from peer-reviewed circadian publications used for validation and falsification

bias_audit.description: Three automated tests to detect systematic biases in PAR(2) results

tests.name: Time-Shuffle Destruction
tests.description: Verifies eigenvalue rankings depend on temporal order by shuffling timepoints
tests.pass_criterion: Shuffled rankings significantly differ from original (p < 0.001)

tests.name: Irrelevant Metric Correlation
tests.description: Checks for spurious correlations with gene name length, file position, alphabetical order; flags expression-level confounds
tests.pass_criterion: No significant correlation with non-biological features

tests.name: Expression-Matched Null Hierarchy
tests.description: Permutation test (N=200) checking if clock-target gap survives after expression-level matching
tests.pass_criterion: Gap persists after matching for expression level

bias_audit.overall_verdict_system: Green (all pass) / Yellow (1 flag) / Red (multiple failures)

non_circadian_rabani.description: Validation in non-circadian context using Rabani 2014 dendritic cell LPS response
non_circadian_rabani.key_finding: Fast immune responders show systematically lower persistence than sustained effectors
non_circadian_rabani.conclusion: Regulator-to-effector hierarchy validated in non-circadian immune activation context

edge_case_diagnostics.description: Reliability screening framework with 6 diagnostic checks per gene
checks: AR(2) vs AR(3) model order check via AIC

rolling_window.description: Window-based stationarity testing for eigenvalue stability over sub-segments of data

gene_set_hypothesis_tester.description: Custom gene list permutation testing for enrichment of eigenvalue properties

halflife_replication.description: Non-circadian replication of half-life independence finding across 3 new datasets with 11-test robustness deep dive

key_findings: Bootstrap CI for Rabani includes zero — not robust
Permutation p=0.24 for Rabani — not significant after correction
Rho drops to -0.04 after excluding explosive eigenvalues in Rabani
Time-shuffle destruction ratio 0.99 for Rabani — FAIL (signal not temporal-order-dependent)
R-squared > 0.5 subset in Rabani: rho=0.46 but n=54 only
Amit bootstrap CI barely excludes zero, permutation p=0.034 marginal
GSE221103 partial rho controlling expression drops from 0.20 to 0.045
GSE221103 permutation p=0.007 significant but small effect size

combined_evidence.interpretation: Independence holds with adequate temporal resolution (>=24 timepoints, n>1000); weak correlations in short time-series are artifacts of low sample size and explosive eigenvalue contamination

halflife_replication.qualified_claim: mRNA half-life and AR(2) eigenvalue measure orthogonal properties of gene expression dynamics; weak correlations observed in short time-series dissolve under rigorous controls

state_space_comparison.description: Systematic comparison of AR(2) OLS eigenvalue rankings against SARIMAX AR(2) MLE and Local Level structural time-series across 3 datasets
models: SARIMAX AR(2) MLE (4 params, Kalman filter)
Local Level (2 params, structural time series)
state_space_comparison.aic_comparison: AR(2) OLS shows lower residual-based AIC, but OLS and state-space AIC are not directly comparable (different likelihood formulations); parsimony argument rests on parameter count, convergence, and boundary coverage
state_space_comparison.verdict: STRONG ESTIMATOR ROBUSTNESS; MODERATE MODEL-CLASS ROBUSTNESS — hierarchy preserved under AR(2) regardless of estimator; partially preserved under Local Level
state_space_comparison.key_finding: SARIMAX MLE produces near-perfect rank concordance (rho=0.997), confirming estimation method does not affect eigenvalue rankings. The derived dynamical quantity |lambda| is more stable than raw AR coefficients (at 9 tp, coefficient rho=0.361 but eigenvalue rank rho=1.000). SARIMAX convergence failures (34-47%) censor near-critical genes at the unit root boundary.
state_space_comparison.aic_caveat: OLS AIC uses Gaussian residual likelihood; SARIMAX/Local Level use full state-space likelihood — not directly comparable

decomposition_stability.description: Robustness of eigenvalue hierarchy across 6 global driver removal methods
decomposition_stability.simulation_results: 4/4 simulations passed (no false hierarchy, true hierarchy recovered)
decomposition_stability.verdict: WEAK by strict criteria, but hierarchy direction preserved in all tissues with initial gap > 0.10
decomposition_stability.honest_claim: Robust to decomposition method choice for tissues with moderate-to-large initial gaps
